# Generated Files

Several large files are generated or mechanically produced and should not be hand-edited during normal work.

## Route Tree

- Path: `app/routeTree.gen.ts`
- Source: TanStack Router generation
- Regenerated by the Vite/TanStack Start tooling.

## Drizzle Migrations

- Path: `drizzle/**`
- Source: Drizzle Kit
- Script: `npm run db:generate`
- Check: `npm run db:generate:check`

## Extracted Message Catalog

- Path: `lang/en-SG.json`
- Source: FormatJS extraction
- Script: `npm run i18n:extract`

## Station Map Snapshots

- Path: `app/components/StationMap/components/Map*.tsx`
- Source: mechanically converted historical map snapshots.

These files are excluded from normal Biome checks so review focuses on source-owned code.
